hero.headline: The fix you need, *without the runaround*
hero.subheadline: One number handles everything — from squeaky hinges to full bathroom renovations. Raleigh homeowners know who to call.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: What We Handle
services_section.subheading: From the tiny repairs that drive you crazy to the big projects that transform your space

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Leaky faucets, running toilets, clogged drains — we fix what's broken and prevent what's about to break.

services.title: Electrical Work
services.description: New outlets, ceiling fans, light fixtures, and electrical troubleshooting. Safe, code-compliant work every time.

services.title: Carpentry & Trim
services.description: Custom shelving, door installation, crown molding, and those finishing touches that make a house feel complete.

services.title: Drywall & Painting
services.description: Patch holes, texture matching, full room painting — making walls look like the damage never happened.

services.title: Bathroom Renovations
services.description: Complete bathroom makeovers from tile to fixtures. Transform your most-used room into something you actually enjoy.

about.heading: Built Different in Raleigh
about.body: We consolidated all the trades under one roof because jumping between contractors is exhausting. One estimate, one timeline, one team responsible for getting it right. Been serving Raleigh homeowners with honest work and fair pricing.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where We Work
service_areas.subheading: Serving Raleigh and the surrounding Triangle communities

cta.heading: Ready to Fix What's Broken?
cta.body: Stop putting off those repairs. One call gets everything on your list handled by people who actually show up when they say they will.
